name: Merge Request Opened - New Feature
description: Simulates a new merge request that needs code review and test suggestions

payload.mr_description: Adds a new endpoint for retrieving user analytics data including session counts, page views, and engagement metrics.
payload.diff:
diff --git a/src/routes/analytics.py b/src/routes/analytics.py
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/routes/analytics.py
@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+from fastapi import APIRouter, Query
+from services.analytics_service import AnalyticsService
+
+router = APIRouter()
+service = AnalyticsService()
+
+@router.get('/analytics/users/{user_id}')
+async def get_user_analytics(user_id: str, days: int = Query(default=30)):
+    data = service.get_analytics(user_id, days)
+    return {'analytics': data}
+
+@router.get('/analytics/summary')
+async def get_summary(days: int = 7):
+    # TODO: add authentication
+    summary = service.get_summary(days)
+    return summary
